info.name: Microsoft Azure Power BI Embedded Management Client
info.description: Client to manage your Power BI Embedded workspace collections and retrieve workspaces.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname Listkeys

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Retrieves the primary and secondary access keys for the specified Power BI Workspace Collection.

response.name: Get access keys completed successfully
Default Response. It will be deserialized as per the Error definition specified in the schema. Exception will be thrown.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname Regeneratekey

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Regenerates the primary or secondary access key for the specified Power BI Workspace Collection.

response.name: Get access keys completed successfully
Default Response. It will be deserialized as per the Error definition specified in the schema. Exception will be thrown.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname Workspaces

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Retrieves all existing Power BI workspaces in the specified workspace collection.

response.name: Get workspaces completed successfully
Default Response. It will be deserialized as per the Error definition specified in the schema. Exception will be thrown.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Retrieves an existing Power BI Workspace Collection.

response.name: Workspace collection created successfully
Default Response. It will be deserialized as per the Error definition specified in the schema. Exception will be thrown.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Creates a new Power BI Workspace Collection with the specified properties. A Power BI Workspace Collection contains one or more workspaces, and can be used to provision keys that provide API access to those workspaces.

response.name: Workspace collection created successfully
Default Response. It will be deserialized as per the Error definition specified in the schema. Exception will be thrown.

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name

request.description: Update an existing Power BI Workspace Collection with the specified properties.

response.name: Workspace collection updated successfully

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Powerbi Workspacecollections Workspacecollectionname

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify a Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) Azure resource group
(Required) Power BI Embedded Workspace Collection name
